benchmark.queryShape: OpenSearch products_search_read alias, nested options filter, from/size OFFSET-equivalent pagination
notes: OpenSearch API uses the feature-flagged /api/v1/products/search read path.
DB read path remains available only for fallback and must not be used by the primary OpenSearch result.
B1/B2/B3 constants are copied from the latest official k6 README/scripts for product-search-baseline-v1.
PROFILE is k6 metadata/tagging only; Spring application properties select the OpenSearch alias and read path.

requestScenarios.name: B1_selective_option_filter
requestScenarios.purpose: Selective category and brand product search with price and option filters.

requestScenarios.name: B2_broad_active_option_filter
requestScenarios.purpose: Broad active-product option filter with latest-created ordering.

requestScenarios.name: B3_deep_offset_option_filter
requestScenarios.purpose: Deeper page of the same selective category and brand product search as B1.
